subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God! Thou hast attained unto that which the peoples of the world are deprived and forbidden, save for a chosen few [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لله الحمد فائز شدی بانچه اهل عالم از آن محروم و ممنوعند مگر معدودی سبحاترا
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
